groups.instruction: Answer the questions based on the audio.
groups.prompt_html:
MULTIPLE CHOICE 26

Questions 36 - 40

Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

36 Microbursts ...

A ... can create very strong winds.
B ... influence the appearance of thunderstorms.
C ... can appear due to a lack of rainfall.

37 Which of the following human activities is said to increase the likelihood of haboobs?

A Driving off road
B Farming
C Building dams

38 How much of Texas is said to be suffering from a lack of rain?

A 19 per cent
B 92 per cent
C 90 per cent

39 How does the speaker compare the possible future problems?

A She says that they will be slightly better than the period of drought in the 1930s.
B She says that they will be a lot worse than the period of drought in the 1930s.
C She says that they will be more or less the same as the period of drought in the 1930s.

40 What have meteorologists said about the scale and strength of some of last year's storms?

A They were caused by an excessive amount of sand.
B They were due to the excessive temperatures in the region.
C One particular reason for the power of the storms has not been identified.

items.prompt_html: Which of the following human activities is said to increase the likelihood of haboobs?
How much of Texas is said to be suffering from a lack of rain?
How does the speaker compare the possible future problems?
What have meteorologists said about the scale and strength of some of last year's storms?

options.label: A
options.text: They were caused by an excessive amount of sand.

options.label: B
options.text: They were due to the excessive temperatures in the region.

options.label: C
options.text: One particular reason for the power of the storms has not been identified.
